Quality Education.reason: As a university course, it provides tertiary education and professional knowledge, contributing to skills for employment (Targets 4.3, 4.4).

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course on 'Commercial Law' provides the legal framework for economic growth, entrepreneurship, and strengthening financial institutions (Targets 8.3, 8.10).

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: 'Commercial Law' provides the legal structure for industry. 'Respect Copyright' directly relates to protecting innovation and research (Targets 9.3, 9.5).

Reduced Inequalities.reason: Commercial law involves regulating financial markets (Target 10.5), but the course description does not specify a focus on reducing inequality.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: As a law course, it directly promotes the rule of law (Target 16.3). Commercial law helps develop accountable institutions and combat corruption (Targets 16.5, 16.6).

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: Commercial law is foundational to the rules-based trading system (Target 17.10), but the course description lacks specific evidence of an international focus.
